hypothesis: Scaffold retro games portal with Next.js 16, Tailwind v4 retro theme, and game card grid
ceo_rationale: Greenfield project, no eval baseline. Force verdict based on QA: build pass, lint pass, TypeScript clean, 14/14 feature tests pass, plan completion 9/9.
learned: Tailwind v4 CSS-first @theme directive cleanly separates design tokens from component code; Press Start 2P is the standard pixel font for retro portal headings.
anti_patterns: Don't over-engineer for 3 games — static data file is sufficient, no database needed
Don't use Tailwind v3 config patterns — v4 uses @import 'tailwindcss' and @theme, not tailwind.config.ts
Don't add image assets in v1 — colored placeholder thumbnails with emojis work for initial portal
